close_reason: Updated LogReplayPhase to pass all survivors and added multi-source recovery to Shale
description:
## Goal
Enable log server to rebuild from multiple source logs, filtering by shard index.

## File
`lib/bedrock/data_plane/log/shale/recovery.ex`

## Current Behavior
`pull_transactions/4` pulls from a single source log.

## New Behavior
- Accept multiple source logs instead of single source
- Pull transactions from all sources in version order
- Use shard index embedded in transactions to filter for assigned shards
- Compute assigned shards via ShardRouter.get_log_indices
- Reconstruct personalized transaction stream

## Key Insight
Transactions contain a SHARD_INDEX section that identifies which mutations belong to which shards. The replacement log uses this to extract only mutations for shards it serves (determined by consistent hash).

## Depends On
Task 2 (LogReplayPhase must pass survivor list)
title: Add multi-source coalescing to Shale recovery
